title: Help with Assigning Project Managers in monday.com Portfolio Solution

posts.author: Shoaibali450 (Shoaib Ali)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

I’ve recently started using the monday.com portfolio solution. Currently, I’m pulling projects from the Project Request and Approval board, and once a project is approved, it gets created on the Portfolio board. A low-level project board is also created from a template.

My concern is that I want to assign a Project Manager in the People column on the Portfolio board, and have that manager automatically assigned to the People column on the low-level project board as well. The Project Manager should also be subscribed to the low-level board.

Any help or guidance on how to set this up would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!
